summary_en: Correction to tender offer announcement for Ryomo Systems: per-share dividend raised from ¥22 to ¥44 for FY2026, and no-dividend resolution extended to cover both Q2 FY2026 and full-year FY2027.
title_en: Correction Notice Regarding the Announcement of Commencement of Tender Offer for Ryomo Systems Inc. (Securities Code: 9691)
translation_en_brief: This is a correction notice issued jointly by Mitsuba Corporation (7280) and Chubu Electric Power Co., Ltd. (9502) on May 18, 2026, addressing errors in their May 14, 2026 announcement regarding a tender offer for Ryomo Systems Inc. (9691). The primary corrections relate to dividend information: the per-share dividend for FY2026 (ended March 2026) is corrected upward from ¥22 to ¥44. Additionally, the no-dividend resolution originally applicable only to the second quarter (September 30, 2026) has been expanded to also cover the full-year ended March 31, 2027. These corrections are material to investors' assessment of the tender offer terms and financial position of the target company.
